presets.name: Code Architect
presets.description: Designs feature architectures by analyzing existing codebase patterns and conventions

presets.name: Code Reviewer
presets.description: Reviews code for bugs, security issues, and best practice violations

presets.name: Test Designer
presets.description: Designs comprehensive test strategies and writes test cases

presets.name: TDD Guide
presets.description: Guides test-driven development: write tests first, then implementation
presets.tools: Glob, Grep, Read, Bash, Write, Edit

presets.name: Doc Writer
presets.description: Generates and maintains project documentation, READMEs, and API docs

presets.name: Security Reviewer
presets.description: Scans for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, secrets, and security anti-patterns

presets.name: PM Agent
presets.description: Breaks down features into tasks, manages priorities, and tracks progress

presets.name: Refactor Agent
presets.description: Identifies code smells and refactors for clarity and maintainability
